activation_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Stage F Activation walks an approved envelope into the live operating state — every step is human-authorized, audit-emitted, and reversible by construction.
activation_defaults.model_usage_notes: Activation plans are DESIGN_NOT_EXECUTED. Real activation requires a future implementation slice that consumes this catalog.
audit_expectations: future ADMIN_ACTION:STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATED + per-step audit literals at the implementation slice

activation_plan.name: Business Activation Plan
activation_plan.description: Canonical ordered sequence to activate the Business Starter Envelope (envelope.business.v1). Walks a project-and-customer-scoped envelope at the Foundation runtime tier — multi-connector binding (Slack C2 + Google Workspace C3) + project/customer DMW + delegated authority profiles + Stage 2 workflow templates + advanced audit + dual-control on financial-effect operations. Every step is human-authorized and audit-emitted.
activation_plan.human_readable_summary: Business-scope activation: baseline + team + project + customer DMW; Slack + Google connectors; delegated authority profiles; advanced audit; dual-control on financial-effect operations.
activation_plan.model_usage_notes: Use this plan for the Business plan tier. Two connector bindings register in sequence (Slack first per Wave 6 priority + Google Workspace second per C3 RUNTIME_READY). Delegated authority profiles are registered with explicit ceiling-never-exceeds-human enforcement per RULE 0.

activation_steps.step_purpose: Verify envelope DRAFT_NOT_ACTIVATED + caller admin capabilities + org match.

activation_steps.step_name: Extend DMW to project + customer scopes
activation_steps.step_purpose: Add project-scoped + customer-scoped DMW extensions. Maps to the Business envelope DMW_scope_ceiling.
Register business-tier role templates per W3 catalog (Sales / Customer Success / Project Management / General Counsel).
activation_steps.rollback_path: Soft-delete assignment rows; emit ROLE_TEMPLATE_UNASSIGNED per row

activation_steps.step_purpose: Register delegated authority profiles per ADR-0080 Authority Map. Every profile enforces 'delegated authority ceiling never exceeds human ceiling' per RULE 0.
postconditions: delegated authority profiles LIVE; ceiling-never-exceeds-human enforced at every profile
activation_steps.rollback_path: Soft-delete authority profile rows; emit DELEGATED_AUTHORITY_REVOKED per row

activation_steps.step_purpose: Register SLACK_READ binding per C2 OPERATING. secret_ref env-var-NAME only.
activation_steps.produces_runtime_object: ConnectorBinding row (type: SLACK_READ; use_real: false at activation tier)
postconditions: SLACK_READ binding LIVE; secret_ref env-var-NAME stored

activation_steps.step_name: Register Google Workspace read-first connector binding
activation_steps.step_purpose: Register GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_READ binding per C3 RUNTIME_READY (Foundation PR #193). secret_ref env-var-NAME only; ya29.* tokens NEVER persisted.
activation_steps.produces_runtime_object: ConnectorBinding row (type: GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_READ; use_real: false at activation tier)
postconditions: GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_READ binding LIVE; secret_ref env-var-NAME stored

activation_steps.step_purpose: Register Business plan Stage 2 templates per W3 catalog (executive brief, commitment followup, sprint risk, roadmap, account brief, pipeline risk, customer health, support escalation, spend approval, contract review queue, weekly execution review, onboarding). All TEMPLATE_ONLY. Spend approval + contract review carry dual_control_required_at_stage_3.
postconditions: 12 Stage 2 templates LIVE; workflow_state TEMPLATE_ONLY for every template
activation_steps.rollback_path: Soft-delete template rows; emit WORKFLOW_TEMPLATE_UNREGISTERED per row

activation_steps.step_purpose: Enable advanced audit features for the Business plan tier — additional audit projection surfaces + extended retention + per-permission audit emission. Builds on the always-on baseline audit per ADR-0002.
activation_steps.produces_runtime_object: Advanced audit tier flag on org_settings
postconditions: advanced audit tier LIVE on org_settings
activation_steps.rollback_path: Unset advanced audit tier flag; emit ADVANCED_AUDIT_TIER_DISABLED

activation_steps.step_purpose: Register Business-tier aha-moment surface — first-week activation hints that consume both Slack + Google bindings + Stage 2 templates.
Final state-flip; emit STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATED with full lineage.
activation_steps.rollback_path: Walk steps 10 → 1 in reverse; emit STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATION_ROLLED_BACK at completion

audit_expectations: Every step emits exactly one audit literal BEFORE the underlying mutation per RULE 4
Every rollback emits an inverse audit literal AFTER the soft-delete row update
STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATED audit details include the ordered audit_event_id list from steps 1-10
Connector binding registration audit details NEVER include the resolved env-var VALUE — only the env-var NAME (true for both Slack + Google)
Delegated authority profile registration audit details record the ceiling-never-exceeds-human enforcement check result
Advanced audit tier enablement emits its own audit literal independently of the per-step audit

rollback_steps: On any step failure, walk preceding steps in reverse order
Each step's rollback_path is called; each emits the per-step inverse audit literal
Final rollback emits STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATION_ROLLED_BACK with failed step_id + partial lineage
Connector binding rollback NEVER attempts to revoke the underlying bot token / OAuth access token at the third-party tier — that is the operator's responsibility
Delegated authority profile rollback re-enforces the ceiling-never-exceeds-human invariant before soft-delete
rollback_strategy.reversibility_guarantee: Activation is fully reversible by construction. Multi-connector + multi-scope rollback walks every step's rollback_path in reverse order; a partial activation state is impossible to leave behind.

human_authorization_points.authorization_purpose: Confirm delegated authority profile registration. Required before step 5 fires.

safe_defaults: Every step emits audit BEFORE the underlying mutation (RULE 4)
Every step's rollback_path is reversible via soft-delete (RULE 10)
Connector bindings registered with use_real: false at activation tier; Founder authorizes real-mode flip separately
Stage 2 templates remain TEMPLATE_ONLY at activation tier
Delegated authority ceiling-never-exceeds-human enforced at every profile registration per RULE 0
Advanced audit tier extends baseline audit; never replaces or weakens it
Activation is single-cycle; concurrent attempts rejected at step 1
Connector binding secret_ref env-var-NAME only; resolved VALUE never persisted, echoed, or audited
forbidden_defaults: Auto-activation without ORG_ADMIN authorization is forbidden
Hard-delete of any activation row is forbidden (RULE 10)
Re-attempting a failed activation in-place is forbidden
Audit emission AFTER mutation is forbidden (RULE 4)
Resolved env-var VALUE in any audit detail / response / log / row is absolutely forbidden
Auto-flip to use_real: true at activation tier is forbidden
Delegated authority profile registration that exceeds the human ceiling is absolutely forbidden
Advanced audit tier with weaker retention than baseline is forbidden
